hero.title: The Bridge between the Atlantic and Pacific
hero.subtitle: Bioceanic Route — 4 Countries, One Story
hero.description: From the Pantanal border of Mato Grosso do Sul to the Chilean bays of the Pacific, the Bioceanic Route crosses indigenous peoples, Mennonite heritage, Andean folklore and landscapes of rare beauty across more than 3,500 km of living history and identity.

cities.title: Route Cities
cities.subtitle: Strategic development points
cities.sectionDescription: From the Pantanal to the Pacific — Brazil, Paraguay, Argentina and Chile. Each stop on the route carries a story the world doesn't know yet.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Receive the latest news about investments and opportunities on the Bioceanic Route.
